## Summary

<!-- What does this PR change and why? -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature (new unit, method, or capability)
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Refactor / tooling

## Checklist

- [ ] `composer test` passes
- [ ] `composer analyse` (PHPStan) passes
- [ ] `composer cs` (PHP-CS-Fixer) passes
- [ ] Added/updated tests for the change
- [ ] Updated `README.md` / `CHANGELOG.md` if behavior changed
